headline: Gartner (IT) Valuation Check After Q1 Earnings Beat And AI Growth Focus
summary: Gartner (IT) is back in focus after its latest Q1 earnings, where the company reported revenue and profit above expectations, stronger cash generation, higher full year targets, and highlighted AI as a key business priority. See our latest analysis for Gartner. That stronger Q1 update has helped the share price regain some ground, with a 1-day share price return of 2.8% and a 7-day share price return of 9.69%. However, year to date the share price return has fallen 33.15%, and the 1-year...
